title: cerastium lucorum
intro: Cerastium lucorum, also known as Snow-in-summer or Mountain Snow, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cerastium lucorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
